feed.title: Daily weather forecast — Chrzanów,PL

entry.title: Chrzanów, PL: Thu 11 Jun — Light rain, 13–14°C
entry.content:
Light rain · High 14°C · Low 13°C

  • Chance of precipitation: 97%
  • Feels like (midday): 14°C
